zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William Adam III於1220年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，他的父親Sir William FitzAdam II25歲，母親Margery DeQuarmby17歲。他於1237年與Lady Elizabeth DeGournai在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1300年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 亞當享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord William Adam III于1220年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，他的父亲Sir William FitzAdam II25岁，母亲Margery DeQuarmby17岁。他于1237年与Lady Elizabeth DeGournai在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1300年在英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓 亞當享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Muslim (mainly Ethiopia) and Arabic: from the personal name Adem, a derivative (in Ethiopia) or a variant (among Arabs, e.g. in Algeria) of Arabic Ādam (see Adam 3). This form of the surname is also found among Christian Arabs (e.g. in Lebanon).

variants.name: Ademovic
meanings: Bosniak (Ademović): patronymic from the Muslim personal name Adem , an equivalent of Adam .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William Adam III was born in 1220, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William FitzAdam II, was 25 and his mother, Margery DeQuarmby, was 17. He married Lady Elizabeth DeGournai in 1237, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1300, in Charlton Adam, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William Adam III est né en 1220, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William FitzAdam II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margery DeQuarmby, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth DeGournai en 1237, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1300, à Charlton Adam, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord William Adam IIIが1220年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir William FitzAdam IIは25歳，母Margery DeQuarmbyは17歳であった。1237年にイギリスランカシュアイアでLady Elizabeth DeGournaiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1300年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトン アダムで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord William Adam III(이)가 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William FitzAdam II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery DeQuarmby(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1237년 영국 랭카실르에서 Lady Elizabeth DeGournai(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 애다에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth DeGournai em 1237, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William Adam III родился в 1220 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William FitzAdam II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery DeQuarmby, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth DeGournai в 1237 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1300 г. в местности чарлтон адам, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.
